assessment_objectives.objective: roles and responsibilities exist to compel data and/or process owners to assess if required cybersecurity / data privacy controls for each system, application and/or service under their control are implemented correctly and are operating as intended.

Individual Contributor (IC) performance reviews cover how data and/or process owners assess if required cybersecurity / data privacy controls for each system, application and/or service under their control are implemented correctly and are operating as intended.
